subject: Inspect UI patterns and spanHighlighter utility for EvidenceHighlight
description: Read existing components styling conventions and confirm byteOffsetsToStringRange API; find existing hash format usage.
activeForm: Confirmed Tailwind patterns, existing hash utilities (apps/ui/src/lib/byteOffsets.ts), and byteOffsetsToStringRange API (apps/ui/src/lib/spanHighlighter.ts).
